bug: lineRule default when direct spacing omits it
description: Style has lineRule=exact. Direct w:spacing sets line but omits lineRule. The lineRule should default to auto per §17.3.1.33, not inherit from the style.

expected.para_1: line=480, lineRule=auto (default, NOT exact from style)
expected.para_2: line=480, lineRule=auto (default, NOT atLeast from style)
expected.para_3: line=360, lineRule=exact (from style, no direct override)
